A

addDefaultField(String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext.Builder
Records a field generated by the default InputSpec pipeline.
additionalCrossConstraints(FormContext) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContributor
Returns additional CrossConstraintDescriptor JSON strings to append to the crossConstraints array of the FormSpec.
additionalFields(FormContext) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContributor
Returns additional InputFieldSpec JSON strings to append to the fields array of the FormSpec, in the returned list order.
addTransformedField(String, String, String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext.Builder
Records a field that was claimed and transformed by a FieldTransformer.
allFieldNames() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext
 
allFieldNames() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext
Logical names (camelCase) of ALL fields in the form, both transformed and default-generated.
annotationEnumList(AnnotationMirror, String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
annotationEnumList(AnnotationMirror, String) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
Reads an enum array attribute, returning the simple names of the constants.
annotationMirrorList(AnnotationMirror, String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
annotationMirrorList(AnnotationMirror, String) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
Reads all nested annotation mirrors from an annotation array attribute.
annotationStringList(AnnotationMirror, String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
annotationStringList(AnnotationMirror, String) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
Reads a String[] attribute from an annotation mirror.
annotationStringValue(AnnotationMirror, String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
annotationStringValue(AnnotationMirror, String) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
Reads a String attribute from an annotation mirror.

B

build() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext.Builder
 
builder(String) - Static method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext
 
bundle() - Method in record class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher.TransformResult
Returns the value of the bundle record component.
bundleEntries(FieldContext) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldTransformer
Returns the i18n bundle entries (key → default text) for all i18nKey references emitted by FieldTransformer.transform(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext).
bundleEntries(FormContext) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContributor
Returns the i18n bundle entries (key → default text) for all i18nKey references emitted by FormContributor.additionalFields(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) and FormContributor.additionalCrossConstraints(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext).

C

collectAdditionalCrossConstraints(FormContext) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher
Collects additional CrossConstraintDescriptor JSON strings from all active FormContributors.
collectAdditionalFields(FormContext) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher
Collects additional InputFieldSpec JSON strings from all active FormContributors.
collectBundleEntries(FormContext) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher
Collects all i18n bundle entries (key → default text) from all active FormContributors.

Contract - Search tag in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContributor

D

DefaultFieldContext - Class in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
Default implementation of FieldContext, constructed by the InputSpec annotation processor for each @FieldMeta element it encounters.
DefaultFieldContext(Element, String, TypeMirror, String, List<String>, Types, Elements) - Constructor for class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
DefaultFormContext - Class in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
Default implementation of FormContext, constructed by the InputSpec annotation processor after all fields of a @FormSpec type have been processed.
DefaultFormContext.Builder - Class in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
 
defaultPageSize() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext
 
defaultPageSize() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext
Default page size hint.
defaultPageSize(int) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext.Builder
 
difspDataType() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
difspDataType() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
Returns the DIFSP dataType string for this field's scalar type: STRING, NUMBER, DATE, BOOLEAN, OBJECT.

E

element() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
element() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
The underlying element: a VariableElement (field) or ExecutableElement (method).
enumConstants() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
enumConstants() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
If FieldContext.isEnum() is true, returns the simple names of all enum constants in declaration order.
equals(Object) - Method in record class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher.TransformResult
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
Example - Search tag in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContributor
Section

F

FieldContext - Interface in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
Immutable view of a single @FieldMeta-annotated element (field or method) as seen during annotation processing.
fieldMeta() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
fieldMeta() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
The resolved @FieldMeta mirror for this element, if present.
fieldName() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
fieldName() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
Logical field name, derived from the element: getName() → "name" isActive() → "active" status (field) → "status"
fieldRefName(FieldContext) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldTransformer
Returns the stable reference name for this field as it should appear in FormContext.transformedFieldRefs() and in the generated JSON.
FieldTransformer - Interface in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
SPI extension point: transforms a single @FieldMeta-annotated element into a custom DIFSP InputFieldSpec JSON object.
fieldType() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
fieldType() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
The declared type of the field or return type of the method.
findAnnotation(String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
findAnnotation(String) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
Finds the first annotation with the given fully-qualified class name.
formatHint() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
formatHint() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
Returns the format hint for this field type, if applicable.
FormContext - Interface in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
Immutable view of a partially-assembled FormSpec, passed to FormContributor.supports(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) and FormContributor.additionalFields(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext).
FormContributor - Interface in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
SPI extension point: contributes additional fields and cross-constraints to a FormSpec after all individual elements have been processed.
formId() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
formId() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext
 
formId() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
The form ID declared in @FormSpec.
formId() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext
The form ID declared in @FormSpec.

H

hasAnnotation(String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFieldContext
 
hasAnnotation(String) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldContext
Returns true if the element carries an annotation with this qualified name.
hasExtensions() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher
Returns true if at least one FieldTransformer or FormContributor is registered.
hashCode() - Method in record class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher.TransformResult
Returns a hash code value for this object.

Returns true if the field type is a collection (List, Set, Collection) or an array — i.e.

Maximum page size enforced as a maxValue constraint.

Registration - Search tag in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContributor
Section

S

SpiDispatcher - Class in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
Loaded once per processor round, this class discovers all registered FieldTransformer and FormContributor implementations via ServiceLoader and dispatches to them during FormSpec generation.
SpiDispatcher(Messager) - Constructor for class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher
 
SpiDispatcher.TransformResult - Record Class in io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi
Result of a successful field transformation.
submitMethod() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext
 
submitMethod() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext
The HTTP method for submission: POST or PUT.
submitMethod(String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext.Builder
 
submitUri() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext
 
submitUri() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext
The submit URI declared in @FormSpec.submitUri.
submitUri(String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext.Builder
 
supports(FieldContext) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldTransformer
Returns true if this transformer handles the given element.
supports(FormContext) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContributor
Returns true if this contributor should activate for the given form.

T

toString() - Method in record class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher.TransformResult
Returns a string representation of this record class.
transform(FieldContext) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FieldTransformer
Produces the DIFSP InputFieldSpec JSON string for this element.
transformedFieldJson(String) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext
 
transformedFieldJson(String) - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext
Returns the generated JSON string for a transformed field, by its ref.
transformedFieldRefs() - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.DefaultFormContext
 
transformedFieldRefs() - Method in interface io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext
Names of all fields claimed by a FieldTransformer during processing.
TransformResult(String, String, Map<String, String>) - Constructor for record class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher.TransformResult
Creates an instance of a TransformResult record class.
tryTransform(FieldContext) - Method in class io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.SpiDispatcher
Attempts to find a FieldTransformer that claims the given field.
